highlights.description: Complete toolkit for D2 diagram parsing, generation, and AI-assisted creation
TOON output format (default) uses ~40% fewer tokens than JSON - ideal for LLM consumption
Embedded D2 rendering engine - no separate D2 CLI installation required

added.description: Core diagram types: `Diagram`, `Node`, `Edge`, `Bounds` with full styling support
SVG parser that decodes D2's base64-encoded element IDs from CSS class names
Shape type constants: rectangle, circle, cylinder, diamond, hexagon, and more
Geometry utilities for points and bounds operations
NLP descriptions: `Describe()`, `DescribeSummary()`, `DescribeDetailed()`, `DescribeForLLM()`
Layout analysis detecting patterns (flow, hierarchical, grid) with generation hints
`format` package with TOON (default), JSON, JSON-compact, and YAML output formats
`DiagramSpec` for generating D2 code from structured specifications
`PipelineSpec` for workflow diagrams with stages, executors, swimlanes, and decision branches
Pipeline rendering modes: detailed, simple, swimlane, and decision
`render` package with embedded D2 rendering engine for SVG/PNG/PDF output
Mermaid converter: flowchart, sequence, and class diagram support
PlantUML converter: sequence, class, and component diagram support
Icon library access with 185+ D2 icons across 8 categories
Embedded JSON schemas for DiagramSpec, PipelineSpec, and SequenceSpec
`parse` command to extract structure from D2-generated SVG
`generate` command to create D2 code from specifications
`template` command with 7 patterns: network-boundary, microservices, data-flow, sequence, entity-relationship, deployment, pipeline
`learn` command to reverse engineer D2 from existing SVG
`lint` command to check D2 files for layout issues
`diff` command to compare two diagrams
`watch` command for auto-rendering D2 files on changes
`analyze` command to analyze layout characteristics
`convert` command for Mermaid/PlantUML to D2 conversion
`pipeline` command to generate workflow diagrams from PipelineSpec
`rotate` command to rotate SVG by 90° increments
`icons` command to browse/search D2 icon library

documentation.description: 7 example projects: network_clusters, microservices, data_flow, sequence, entity_relationship, deployment, pipeline
MkDocs documentation site with Material theme
Command reference for all 12 CLI commands
Cookbook with layout fundamentals, container patterns, and styling guides

tests.description: Unit tests for parser, geometry, ID encoding, NLP, and layout analysis
Test data with sample SVG files for parsing tests

build.description: GitHub Actions workflows: go-ci, go-lint, go-sast-codeql, docs, release

fixed.description: Use tagged switch on token type to satisfy staticcheck QF1003
